raw_consumer_statement:
I was charged on XX/XX/2023 for {$1500.00} from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX which was in error as it was unauthorized and I did not obtain insurance from them. 

I contacted Citi Cards over and over and opened a dispute. They say that I accepted the charge and closed the dispute which never happened. 

XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX acknowledges that they owe me the money and that it will be credited back to my account. This has not happened.
